form.formComment: Scored by 2.25 lengths last time (28.05) in a Grade 5 over 484m at this track. Has three successes and three minors from 10 starts from box 1. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts.

form.formComment: Turned in a good run last time, placing (28.11) at this track in a Grade 5. Lines up from box 2 for the first time. Among the main chances.

form.formComment: Placed only run here over this trip. Last start finished 2nd on April 2 over 484m at this track behind Cookey Charisma beaten 2.25 lengths (28.21) in a Grade 5. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed only run here over this trip. Last start finished 2nd on April 2 over 484m at this track behind Cookey Charisma beaten 2.25 lengths (28.21) in a Grade 5. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.

form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 1.75 lengths at this track over 484m (27.95) beating Chad's Girl in Grade 5 on April 2. Expected to measure up again.

form.formComment: Has been in the minor money the last two runs, the latest at big odds finishing third (28.16) at this track. Squeeze draw to overcome. Prefer others.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by one length over 484m at this track in a handy (28.03), beating Go Wild Blue. Will find this a bit tougher, doesn't look smart enough to threaten the top few.

form.formComment: Has been in the money the last two runs. Finished second at this track in 28.08 last time but the start prior recorded a slick 27.80 over 484m finishing second at this track. Expected to go close with a repeat.

form.formComment: He hasn't been setting the track on fire and faces tougher opposition here. Not going well enough to figure in this.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Momentarily encountered the rail after the completion of the event.

form.formComment: Got off the mark three back with his maiden win at Grafton. Placed following that before a last start fourth at this track. Looks a danger to the top few if returns to best form this time.
